ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the accident */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the accident occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the accident */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of accident (e.g., vehicle-vehicle, vehicle-pedestrian) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the accident (e.g., slight, serious, fatal) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the accident (e.g., daylight, darkness, rain) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the accident report */,
  "reporting_authority" TEXT /* Authority that reported the accident */,
  "reporting_date" TEXT /* Date the accident was reported */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the accident location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the accident location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the vehicle was involved in */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., automobile, lorry, public) */,
  "driver_relation" TEXT /* Relation of the driver to the vehicle (e.g., employee, owner) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the vehicle (e.g., owner, governmental) */,
  "vehicle_registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Manufacturing year of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., personal, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the driver was involved in */,
  "age_band" TEXT /* Age band of the driver (e.g., 18-30, 31-50) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the driver (e.g., male, female) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the driver (e.g., junior high school, above high school) */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Driving experience of the driver (e.g., 1-2 years, above 10 years) */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "driver_license_type" TEXT /* Type of driver's license (e.g., commercial, non-commercial) */,
  "driver_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the driver has been driving */,
  "driver_education_level" TEXT /* Driver's education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casualties" (
  "casualty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casualty */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the casualty was involved in */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the casualty (e.g., driver, passenger, pedestrian) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the casualty (e.g., male, female) */,
  "age_band" TEXT /* Age band of the casualty (e.g., 18-30, 31-50) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the casualty's injury (e.g., slight, serious, fatal) */,
  "casualty_injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the casualty's injury (e.g., minor, major, fatal) */,
  "casualty_medical_expenses" TEXT /* Medical expenses incurred by the casualty */,
  "casualty_vehicle_relation" TEXT /* Relation of the casualty to the vehicle (e.g., driver, passenger, pedestrian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casualty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casualties_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road condition */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the condition was observed in */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of road surface (e.g., asphalt, earth) */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Alignment of the road (e.g., straight, curved) */,
  "junction_type" TEXT /* Type of junction (e.g., none, Y-shape) */,
  "road_surface_material" TEXT /* Material used for the road surface (e.g., asphalt, concrete) */,
  "road_lane_count" INTEGER /* Number of lanes on the road */,
  "road_speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit on the road */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_conditions_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the condition was observed in */,
  "light_conditions" TEXT /* Light conditions during the accident (e.g., daylight, darkness) */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the accident (e.g., normal, rain) */,
  "weather_temperature" TEXT /* Temperature during the accident */,
  "weather_humidity" TEXT /* Humidity during the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle movement */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the movement was observed in */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle making the movement */,
  "movement" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., going straight, turning) */,
  "vehicle_movement_speed" TEXT /* Speed of the vehicle during the movement */,
  "vehicle_movement_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the vehicle movement (e.g., north, south, east, west) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_movements_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_movements_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedestrian_movements" (
  "pedestrian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pedestrian movement */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the movement was observed in */,
  "movement" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., going straight, crossing) */,
  "pedestrian_movement_speed" TEXT /* Speed of the pedestrian during the movement */,
  "pedestrian_movement_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the pedestrian movement (e.g., north, south, east, west) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pedestrian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pedestrian_movements_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident the cause was observed in */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Type of cause (e.g., speeding, recklessness) */,
  "cause_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that caused the accident */,
  "cause_driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who caused the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_causes_cause_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_causes_cause_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_causes_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
